name: Linguine with Chicken and Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boned and skinned chicken breast halves
1/2 can pitted black olives, halved, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine basil, parsley, and garlic in a bowl.
2. Cook the pasta al dente and set aside in hot cooking water.
3. Lightly oil and grill chicken and eggplant on medium heat until done.
- Chicken should be cooked through.
- Eggplant should be soft when pierced with a fork.
4. Cut the grilled chicken and eggplant into bite-sized pieces.
5. Drain the pasta well and toss in several drizzles of olive oil to taste, shredded cheese.
6. Add minced garlic and herbs (basil, parsley) and toss gently.
7. Add cooked chicken, eggplant, diced tomatoes, black olives (if used), and green onions (if used).
8. Toss again until all ingredients are well combined.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste, if desired.
10. Serve hot, garnished with additional grated Romano cheese, if desired.
Note: Complete this assembly quickly so the pasta remains hot and the cheese melts properly.
